title: anthyllis vulneraria f. illyrica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. illyrica, also known as Illyrian kidney vetch, is a flowering plant species within the legume family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a potential remedy for wounds, skin issues, and urinary tract problems. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria f. illyrica include soothing and protecting the skin, reducing inflammation, and alleviating symptoms of kidney stones and urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
